doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is a fabrication: the EDPB did not exist until 2018 making the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" impossible, the core legal position contradicts GDPR Recital 26 and established EDPB doctrine, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 can b
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists; the document contains multiple red flags including a supersession reference to a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB itself only came into existence in 2018), a legal position (pseudonymized data held by non-key-holders falling entirely outside GDPR's material scope) that directly contradicts GDPR Recital 26 and settled EDPB doctrine, and a citation to a CJEU case (C-604/22) whose subject matter does not support the proposition advanced here.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is a fabrication: the EDPB did not exist until 2018 making the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" impossible, the core legal position contradicts GDPR Recital 26 and established EDPB doctrine, and no such Guidance Note 04/2026 can be verified as a real EDPB publication.
